title: Fix Category Page Article Listing Template
description: Investigate and fix the category page template. Currently, pages like /category/ai-productivity/ are rendering but NOT listing any articles. Ensure that the collection loop in the category template correctly pulls and displays articles assigned to that category. Verify against src/content/ metadata.
result:
{"summary":"## Category Page Template Fixed

### Root Cause
The `where` filter in `.eleventy.js` (line 29-32) accesses `item.data[key]` internally. But the template was calling it with `where("data.category", category)` which tried to access `item.data["data.category"]` — a key that doesn't exist.

### Fix Applied
Changed the template from:
```
{% set articles = collections.allArticles | where("data.category", category) %}
```
to:
```
{% set articles = collections.allArticles | where("category", category) %}
```
This correctly accesses `item.data.category` which matches the article front matter.
